title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers walks through a cleanup checklist to identify surprise charges that persist after deleting cloud resources. The video covers hidden costs from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms to prevent unexpected bills.
